ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {title: 'How does X work?'})-[r1:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'Technology'}),
    p2 = (u:User {uuid: 123})-[r2:ASKED]->(q),
    p3 = (q)-[r3:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer {uuid: 456}),
    p4 = (a)-[r4:PROVIDED]->(u2:User {uuid: 789})
RETURN p1, p2, p3, p4
ground.question: What is the most upvoted answer provided by user 789 to the question about 'Technology' and how does it influence the broader discussion on 'How does X work?'

cypher:
MATCH (u:User {uuid: 789})-[:ASKED]->(q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'Technology'})
MATCH (u)-[:ASKED]->(q)<-[:ANSWERED]-(a:Answer)<-[:PROVIDED]-(u)
MATCH (a)-[:ANSWERED]->(aq:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(at:Tag {name: 'How does X work?'})
WITH a, aq
ORDER BY a.score DESC
LIMIT 1
RETURN aq AS influenced_question
